falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4200 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern match is invalidated because that pattern featured a V-bottom with no retest below 4200; a break below would confirm this is not the same structure and the UNKNOWN verdict should shift to BEARISH

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 39 suggests contained volatility; sustained VIX above 35 would indicate genuine panic rather than blowoff, invalidating the bottom pattern and forcing a risk-off reassessment

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.50% while SPX is below 4400
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal flight-to-safety with risk assets still falling, breaking the correlation structure of the August 2024 bottom where yields and equities stabilized together; confirms this is not a bottom but a breakdown

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
